training_status: Former powerlifter (16-25), resumed training 2 weeks before starting BPC-157
health_conditions: GI issues (ulcers, gastritis, dumping syndrome, heartburn, constipation)

benefits.description: Completely eliminated debilitating stomach problems including constipation, dumping syndrome, heartburn, and pain within 24 hours
Cured insomnia; felt gloriously tired at bedtime, woke up refreshed; previously going 4 days without sleep once per week even on max dose Lunesta

Changed perspective on tasks, reduced procrastination, experienced reward response from completing mundane tasks for first time; felt physical changes in frontal lobe with light aura and vascular pump sensation
Significantly improved workout recovery and allowed tendons to keep pace with muscle strength gains; joints and tendons no longer limiting factor in training
Rapid return to former lifting levels; bench went from 205 to 225x15, squat from 225 to 300+, significant jumps across all lifts over 4 weeks
Acne completely healed during BPC use; uncertain if directly caused by BPC
Maintained pump all day post-workout, muscles looked hard and vascular rather than soft/puffy
Reported it helped with libido/erectile function when asked

side_effects.description: Reduced stimulant impact - caffeine and Vyvanse (70mg) effects shifted to background processing; lost energizing/hyperactive effects of caffeine though focus and alertness remained

protocol_notes: Reconstituted 5mg vial with 3ml bacteriostatic water; drew 12.5 units on 1cc insulin syringe (~250mcg) and squirted into back of mouth, swallowed on empty stomach. Primarily oral route; only injected subcutaneously 3 times (twice in stomach fat, once in wrist). Also taking 70mg Vyvanse, 200mg caffeine, and Clonidine for Vyvanse comedown. Previously tried L-arginine which worked for ~10 days. Later transitioned to GHRP-6 injected subq daily for gut issues after completing BPC-157 course, with positive results.
